title: Bank Draft
description:
Bank draft is a payment instruction represented by a document where the holder (bearer) of document can instruct the bank to pay on behalf of the payer and the payment is guaranteed by the issuing bank. 

A bank draft is a type of check that guarantees payment by the issuing bank after verifying the requesting customer has enough funds to cover it. (Investopedia)

A negotiable instrument where payment is guaranteed by the issuing bank. (Investopedia)

A bank draft is a payment on behalf of the payer, which is guaranteed by the issuing bank. A draft is used when the payee wants a highly secure form of payment. (Accounting Tool)
